	FCompiler
NVHPCFCompilerc
 NVIDIA High Performance Computing (HPC) SDK Fortran Compiler
    https://developer.nvidia.com/hpc-sdk
    Since august 2020 the NVIDIA HPC SDK includes the compilers formerly known as The Portland Group compilers,
    https://www.pgroup.com/index.htm.
    See also `numpy.distutils.fcompiler.pg`.
    
NVIDIA HPC SDKzM\s*(nvfortran|(pg(f77|f90|fortran)) \(aka nvfortran\)) (?P<version>[\d.-]+).*z
<F90>z
-VZ	nvfortranz
-MfixedZ
ranlib)
version_cmdZ
compiler_f77Z
compiler_fixZ
compiler_f90Z	linker_soZ
archiverr
-fpicz
-module z
-Minform=informz
-Mnosecond_underscore)
	pic_flags)
self
B/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/distutils/fcompiler/nv.py
